core.sustainability.models.water_metrics module’āü

WATER METRICS ŌĆō Data classes for water consumption’āü

This module defines data structures for water usage.

Author: Deepak Panigrahy’āü

class core.sustainability.models.water_metrics.WaterIntensityFactors(country_code: str, liters_per_kwh: float, source: str, source_url: str, year: int, data_quality: str = 'medium')[source]’āü

Bases: object

class core.sustainability.models.water_metrics.WaterMetrics(liters: float, per_query_ml: float | None = None, source: str = 'UN-Water 2025', source_url: str | None = 'https://www.unwater.org/publications/un-world-water-development-report-2025', year: int = 2025, calculation_method: str = 'energy_kwh ├Ś grid_water_intensity')[source]’āü
